meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap in your technical expertise. Learn a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end SaaS projects fast.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of deep SaaS architecture knowledge, adopt a 'Component-First' workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform complex engineering requirements into modular, manageable tasks. This approach ensures high-velocity delivery while maintaining professional-grade reliability and scalability for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, your client is expecting a robust SaaS platform, and you’re staring at a blank terminal, paralyzed by the sheer complexity of the architecture. You have the design sense and the drive, but the bridge between 'I have an idea' and 'the system is live' feels like an uncrossable chasm. 

This isn't about learning to code from scratch; it’s about mastering the leverage points of modern AI-assisted engineering. By treating your workflow as a repeatable system rather than a series of manual hurdles, you can deliver enterprise-grade infrastructure without needing a decade of backend experience.

steps.title: Define the Domain Schema
steps.description: Establish the database architecture first. Clear schema definitions prevent technical debt and ensure your AI assistant understands the data relationships.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase-compatible PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including tables for users, organizations, subscriptions, and project items.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a migration file based on the generated schema.sql'

steps.title: Scaffold the API Layer
steps.description: Automate the boilerplate of your API routes. Focus on standardizing your CRUD operations so the client workflow remains predictable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Express/Next.js API layer that implements secure CRUD routes for the defined schema, including basic Zod validation.

steps.title: Implement Authentication Flows
steps.description: Never roll your own auth. Use existing tools to secure your client's application while keeping the integration logic clean.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a NextAuth.js provider setup for the current project, including email and OAuth providers.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic
steps.description: Use AI to write the specific service functions that differentiate your client's SaaS from a generic template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service function for calculating usage-based billing tiers based on the project items table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/services/billing.ts --prompt 'Apply the billing logic generated by Antigravity'

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Use automated test generation to ensure your production code is resilient before the client ever sees it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test suites for the core billing service functions, covering edge cases and error states.

pro_tips: Always keep your schema in a single source-of-truth file; let the AI update the DB and the API simultaneously.
Use Claude Code to create custom CLI aliases for your repetitive tasks to save 30+ minutes per project.
Treat your client's feedback as 'requirements inputs' for your Antigravity prompts to keep the documentation in sync.
Force AI-generated code to include JSDoc comments to ensure long-term maintainability for your clients.
When a feature gets complex, ask the AI to 'break this into smaller, isolated functions' before implementing the logic.
content.next_steps: Once your core infrastructure is live, focus on deploying to Vercel or Railway and implementing a CI/CD pipeline to automate your production releases.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with the technical unknown and start delivering professional SaaS solutions that command premium rates. Our community provides the templates, prompts, and peer reviews you need to scale your freelance business to the next level. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
